name: hwLedger
description: LLM capacity planner + fleet ledger + desktop inference runtime. Tracks hardware fleet audit and provenance for ML workloads with per-layer VRAM estimation.
features: Per-layer VRAM estimation for any model architecture
Live telemetry reconciliation (MLX, mistral.rs, llama.cpp, vLLM, TGI)
Apple Silicon inference via oMlx sidecar
